title: haastia pulvinaris
intro: Haastia pulvinaris, also known as the New Zealand cushion plant, is a type of flowering plant native to New Zealand. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues and as an expectorant to relieve coughs and congestion. Haastia pulvinaris is believed to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation and soothing digestive issues due to its antispasmodic and anti-inflammatory properties. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and flowers can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal and health benefits.
